title: Hypothesis tests
summary: 9709 S2 — null and alternative hypotheses, z-tests, p-values, and errors.
learningObjectives: Carry out z-tests for means and proportions.
Distinguish Type I and Type II errors.

simpleExplanation.title: Testing a claim
simpleExplanation.summary: Assume H₀ is true unless evidence is strong enough to reject. Significance level α controls Type I error risk.
steps: State H₀ and H₁ before calculating.
Compare z to critical value or p to α.
Conclude in context — not just reject/fail to reject.

sections.content: **Hypothesis tests** (6.5) complete Statistics 2. Always write **conclusion in context** with the null hypothesis referenced.
